results.rationale: Inclusion criterion 4 explicitly requires PD-L1 positive tumors, excluding immune-cold/PD-L1-negative TNBC patients.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD threshold required for enrollment; biomarkers collected retrospectively only.
Inclusion criterion #6 explicitly requires PD-L1 CPS >10%, excluding immune-cold BLIS-like patients.
Trial includes an experimental arm requiring PD-L1+ (IC≥1 or CPS≥10) and a separate non-experimental group without this immune-hot requirement.
Eligibility explicitly requires PD-L1 CPS < 10, selecting immune-cold tumors and excluding immune-hot/PD-L1-high patients.
Part 1 second-line requires no immune marker; Part 1 first-line requires PD-L1+; Part 2 requires PD-L1 strong positive—simultaneously permissive and immunogenic-gated arms.
PD-L1 testing required for specimens but no minimum PD-L1/TIL/BRCA threshold mandated for enrollment; any TNBC stage IIA-IIIC eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL threshold, or BRCA/HRD requirement for enrollment; sTIL is assessed but not used as an eligibility gate.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient with brain metastases is eligible regardless of immune phenotype.
PD-L1 status collected but not required for enrollment; all TNBC patients eligible regardless of PD-L1/TIL/BRCA status.
TNBC cohort has no PD-L1, TIL, or BRCA requirement; PD-L1 CPS≥1 applies only to SCCHN arm, not TNBC.
TNBC parts require only prior PD-L1 testing (any result), not a positive threshold; both PD-L1≥1 and <1 are eligible.
Requires PD-L1 positive (SP142, immune cells ≥1%), explicitly excluding PD-L1-negative/immune-cold TNBC patients.
Requires low TILs (sTIL≤40%), CPS<10, or PD-L1<1%, explicitly selecting immune-cold/non-immunogenic TNBC patients.
Requires PD-L1 ≥1% on tumor-infiltrating immune cells by SP142 assay, explicitly excluding PD-L1-negative (immune-cold) patients.
TNBC patients only need prior sacituzumab and pembrolizumab if PD-L1≥10%; no mandatory PD-L1 positivity or BRCA status required for enrollment.
Inclusion requires PDL1 positive or MSI-high status (stage 2/3), explicitly excluding immune-cold PD-L1 negative tumors.
Arm B requires high CD166 only (no immune gate); Arm C additionally requires PD-L1 positivity, gating on immune-hot tumors simultaneously within the same trial.
Tissue collected for PD-L1/TIL detection but no minimum threshold required for enrollment; any TNBC patient eligible regardless of immune-phenotype.
Cohort 1 (TNBC + PD-L1 positive required) is immunogenic-gated; Cohorts 2/3 (HER2-negative, no immune marker requirement) are permissive.
Cohort 2 requires PD-L1 CPS≥1% for TNBC and other tumors, explicitly excluding PD-L1-negative (immune-cold) patients.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 negative status (ineligible for PD(L)1 therapy), thereby selecting immune-cold tumors and excluding immune-hot patients.
TNBC patients must be PD-L1 positive to enroll, explicitly excluding immune-cold PD-L1-negative TNBC tumors.
Trial mandates minimum TIL thresholds (≥5% TNBC, ≥1% LumB, up to ≥50% in specific cohorts), explicitly excluding immune-cold/low-TIL patients.
Inclusion criterion #5 explicitly requires PD-L1 CPS>=1, excluding immune-cold PD-L1-negative TNBC patients.
TNBC arm requires documentation of germline BRCA1/2 mutation status and excludes prior PARPi, enriching for HRD/cold-associated patients rather than PD-L1/TIL-hot patients.
Requires HRD+ score ≥42 or HR-pathway mutations while explicitly excluding gBRCA1/2 carriers, selecting DNA-repair-deficient immune-cold tumors.
Eligibility requires TNBC (ER-/PR-/HER2-) but imposes no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA mutation, or HRD immune-phenotype gating criteria.

TNBC expansion cohort explicitly excludes germline BRCA1/2 mutation carriers, selecting against HRD/immune-cold BRCA-driven tumors paradoxically, but BRCA carriers excluded = cold-associated genotype barred.
Dose-escalation phase open to any solid tumor; TNBC expansion cohorts split by BRCA status but no PD-L1/TIL immune-phenotype gating applied.
Trial excludes BRCA1/2 and PALB2 mutation carriers, removing HRD/immune-cold enriched patients, though pCR requirement may bias toward immunogenic tumors.
Phase 1 allows any PD-L1 status; Phase 2 expansion requires PD-L1 negative, gating on immune-cold tumors specifically.
Centrally confirmed germline BRCA1/2 mutation is mandatory, selecting HRD/immune-cold-associated patients and excluding BRCA-wildtype immune-hot BLIA tumors.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 negative disease or anti-PD1/PD-L1 ineligibility, selecting immune-cold/excluded-immunogenic patients and excluding PD-L1+ immune-hot TNBC.
mTNBC patients must have prior ICI progression and/or be PD-L1 negative, explicitly selecting immune-cold/refractory patients and excluding ICI-naive PD-L1+ immune-hot patients.
TNBC eligibility requires only standard ER/PR-negative pathology; no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD immune-phenotype gating applied.
Trial excludes known deleterious BRCA mutation carriers, effectively selecting HRD-unknown/non-BRCA patients and using a PARP inhibitor mechanism associated with cold/HRD tumors.
Trial explicitly excludes BRCA1/2 mutation carriers, enriching for non-HRD tumors and depleting immune-cold BRCA-associated BLIS subtype patients.
Trial requires TNBC or known BRCA-mutant breast/ovarian cancer, selecting HRD/BRCA-associated immune-cold tumors; no PD-L1/TIL criteria.
Eligibility requires confirmed germline BRCA1/2 mutation, an HRD/immune-cold-associated marker, excluding non-BRCA TNBC patients regardless of PD-L1/TIL status.
Trial requires gBRCA1/2 mutation or high BRCAPRO score (Group A) or TNBC with negative BRCA/family history (Group B), selecting HRD/cold-associated biology; no immune-hot markers required.
Trial requires PD-L1 negative or immunotherapy-refractory status and excludes BRCA mutation carriers, selecting immune-cold/non-immunogenic TNBC patients.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD immune-phenotype gating for TNBC; eligibility based on histology, prior therapy, and performance status only.
Trial requires TNBC or germline BRCA1/2 mutation; BRCA mutation carriers are immune-cold/HRD-enriched, and no PD-L1/TIL hot criteria required.
Exclusion of known pathogenic BRCA mutation carriers selects against a key immune-cold (HRD+) subgroup, biasing toward non-BRCA TNBC; no PD-L1/TIL requirement.
Eligibility requires TNBC or gBRCA mutation; no PD-L1, TIL, or immune-phenotype biomarker gating applied.
Requires BRCA1/2 unmutated plus BRCA1 promoter methylation, selecting HRD-associated cold tumors and excluding immune-hot BLIA patients.
BRCA1/2 mutation carriers are explicitly excluded, selecting against a key immune-cold/HRD-associated subgroup while imposing no PD-L1/TIL requirements.
Requires platinum-sensitivity (HRD surrogate) and enrolls gBRCA1/2-tested patients; PARP inhibitor mechanism targets HRD/cold tumors, excluding immune-hot enrichment criteria.
TNBC arm requires no immune markers but trial overall requires BRCA mutation/HRD context; PARP inhibitor focus selects HRD/BRCA-associated (immune-cold) biology, excluding immune-hot criteria.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 CPS ≥10 (Dako 22C3), directly excluding immune-cold BLIS-like TNBC patients.
Inclusion requires PD-L1 CPS≥1, explicitly selecting immune-hot tumors and excluding PD-L1-negative/immune-cold TNBC patients.
No PD-L1/TIL/BRCA enrollment requirement; prior PD-1 or PARP treatment history referenced only as prior therapy context, not as gating biomarker.
Cohort 1 is PD-L1 unrestricted (permissive), while Cohort 2 explicitly requires PD-L1 negative/cold disease (CPS<10), creating simultaneous immunogenic and cold strata.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 negativity (CPS<10), directly excluding immune-hot/BLIA-like tumors and enriching for immune-cold TNBC patients.
First-line arm explicitly requires PD-L1 negative status, selecting immune-cold/BLIS-like patients; second-line allows both, but the defining novel arm targets PD-L1-negative tumors.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1-negative status (IC<1% by SP142 or CPS<10 by 22C3), excluding immune-hot/BLIA-like tumors and selecting immune-cold patients.
Trial requires PD-L1 negative tumors (or PD-L1+ exhausted by prior anti-PD-L1), effectively selecting immune-cold TNBC and excluding untreated PD-L1+ immune-hot patients.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 positivity, excluding immune-cold BLIS-like TNBC patients.
Trial explicitly includes PD-L1 negative (CPS<10) and IO-ineligible patients; no immune-hot enrichment required, allowing any TNBC regardless of immune phenotype.
No mandatory PD-L1/TIL/BRCA inclusion gate; all TNBC stages eligible regardless of immune-phenotype markers.
Phase 2 preferentially targets PD-L1 CPS<10 (immune-cold) patients; CPS≥10 allowed only if checkpoint inhibitor-ineligible, effectively enriching for cold tumors.
Eligibility explicitly requires PD-L1-negative tumors or PD-L1-positive patients who failed/cannot receive checkpoint inhibitors, thereby enriching for immune-cold patients.
Trial requires patients who are NOT candidates for PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitors, explicitly including PD-L1-negative tumors, thereby enriching for immune-cold phenotypes.
Trial excludes BRCA-mutated and PD-L1-positive patients, selecting immune-cold/non-immunogenic TNBC while excluding hot/BLIA-like patients.
Eligibility requires PD-L1 negative (CPS<10) OR prior anti-PD(L)1 treatment, explicitly selecting immune-cold/checkpoint-resistant patients and excluding untreated PD-L1-high tumors.
TNBC arm explicitly requires historic PD-L1 CPS ≥1%, excluding immune-cold/PD-L1-negative patients.
Eligibility explicitly requires PD-L1-negative tumors or PD-L1-positive patients who failed prior anti-PD-1/L1, effectively enriching for immune-cold patients.
Cohort 1 requires PD-L1 negative (cold-gated); Cohort 2 requires PD-L1 positive patients to have received prior checkpoint inhibitor (immunogenic-gated context), covering both phenotypes.
TNBC arm explicitly requires PD-L1 positive (CPS≥1), excluding immune-cold PD-L1-negative TNBC patients.
Cohort A requires PD-L1 positive (immune-hot); Cohort B requires PD-L1 testing but not positivity, making it permissive on immune phenotype.
PD-L1 status is assessed but not used as an inclusion/exclusion gate; both PD-L1 positive and negative patients are enrolled.
PD-L1 tested centrally for stratification only, not as an inclusion/exclusion criterion; all TNBC patients regardless of PD-L1 status are eligible.
No PD-L1/TIL/BRCA immune-phenotype gate; cohorts select on HER2 expression level only, open to all immune phenotypes.
Trial explicitly requires PD-L1 negative (CPS<10) or checkpoint inhibitor ineligibility, excluding immune-hot/PD-L1+ TNBC patients.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; TNBC group only excludes prior anti-PD-1/PD-L1 treatment, not immune-phenotype markers.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient meeting general performance/lab criteria is eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD criteria required; any TNBC with residual disease post-neoadjuvant chemotherapy is eligible regardless of immune phenotype.
Eligibility based on TNBC histology, nodal/stage criteria, and chemotherapy history; no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or immune-phenotype requirements.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD selection criteria required; any TNBC patient meeting standard clinical criteria is eligible.
Eligibility requires sTILs ≥10%, explicitly selecting immune-hot tumors and excluding immune-cold BLIS-like patients.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; selects on residual disease (RCB-II/III) after NACT regardless of immune phenotype.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; TNBC eligible solely by ER/PgR/HER2 negativity regardless of immune phenotype.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD selection criteria required; any newly diagnosed TNBC stage T1c-T4 is eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; all TNBC patients with radiation indication eligible regardless of immune phenotype.
Eligibility requires TNBC (or HER2+ or LN≥4) with no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or other immune-phenotype criteria specified.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC with advanced disease and limited options is eligible regardless of immune phenotype.
Eligibility requires only TNBC (ER/PR/HER2-negative) with no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or other immune-phenotype selection criteria.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient receiving ICI-based adjuvant chemotherapy is eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD criteria required; TNBC included alongside HER2+ without immune-phenotype gating.
Trial gates on AR+ expression only; no PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements, allowing any immune-phenotype TNBC.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any solid tumor including TNBC eligible regardless of immune phenotype.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; eligibility based solely on TNBC subtype, stage, and treatment history.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or immune-phenotype criteria; accepts any TNBC or HER2+ patient planned for neoadjuvant chemotherapy.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient meeting standard clinicopathologic criteria is eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; selects only on TNBC definition (ER-/PR-/HER2-) with standard clinical criteria.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient eligible regardless of immune-phenotype markers.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD requirements; any TNBC patient eligible regardless of immune-phenotype markers.
No PD-L1, TIL, or BRCA status required; any TNBC patient receiving anti-PD-1/PD-L1 therapy is eligible.
No PD-L1, TIL, BRCA, or HRD criteria required; eligibility based solely on prior chemotherapy history and performance status.
